problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
